member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Configuration.VisualHomeConfiguration
member.summary: Persistent plugin configuration.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Configuration.VisualHomeConfiguration.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Configuration.VisualHomeConfiguration.PluginEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the plugin should serve sections.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Configuration.VisualHomeConfiguration.VisualInjectionEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the frontend should render visual sections.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Configuration.VisualHomeConfiguration.SidebarEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the optional right sidebar is enabled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Configuration.VisualHomeConfiguration.Sections
member.summary: Gets or sets the configured visual sections.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Configuration.VisualHomeConfiguration.StudioCollections
member.summary: Gets or sets studio shortcut definitions.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Configuration.VisualHomeConfiguration.CreateDefaultSections
member.summary: Creates the default section list.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Configuration.VisualHomeConfiguration.CreateDefaultStudios
member.summary: Creates default studio shortcuts.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Controllers.VisualHomeConfigController
member.summary: Administrative endpoints for Visual Home.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Controllers.VisualHomeConfigController.GetConfiguration
member.summary: Gets current plugin configuration.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Controllers.VisualHomeConfigController.SaveConfiguration(Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Configuration.VisualHomeConfiguration)
member.summary: Saves plugin configuration.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Controllers.VisualHomeConfigController.GetLibraries
member.summary: Lists available virtual libraries.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Controllers.VisualHomeConfigController.GetGenres
member.summary: Lists available genres.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Controllers.VisualHomeConfigController.GetOfficialRatings
member.summary: Lists available official ratings.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Controllers.VisualHomeConfigController.GetStudios
member.summary: Lists available studios.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Controllers.VisualHomeConfigController.RestoreDefaults
member.summary: Restores default sections and studios.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Controllers.VisualHomeConfigController.ClearCache
member.summary: Clears Visual Home cache.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Controllers.VisualHomeConfigController.InstallCustomCss
member.summary: Installs the Visual Home CSS import into Jellyfin custom branding CSS.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Controllers.VisualHomeConfigController.RemoveCustomCss
member.summary: Removes the Visual Home CSS import from Jellyfin custom branding CSS.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Controllers.VisualHomeSectionsController
member.summary: Read endpoints and web assets for Visual Home.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Controllers.VisualHomeSectionsController.GetActiveSections(System.String)
member.summary: Gets active renderable sections for the current user.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Controllers.VisualHomeSectionsController.GetSection(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets one section by id.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Controllers.VisualHomeSectionsController.GetClientConfig
member.summary: Gets public frontend configuration.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Controllers.VisualHomeSectionsController.GetAsset(System.String)
member.summary: Serves whitelisted embedded frontend assets.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.StudioCollectionConfig
member.summary: Configures a studio visual shortcut.

member.summary: Gets or sets the studio name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.StudioCollectionConfig.LogoUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional logo URL.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.StudioCollectionConfig.BackdropUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional backdrop URL.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualHomeItemDto
member.summary: Lightweight item payload for Jellyfin Web.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualHomeItemDto.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the item id.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualHomeItemDto.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the item name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualHomeItemDto.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the Jellyfin item type.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualHomeItemDto.Overview
member.summary: Gets or sets the overview.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualHomeItemDto.ProductionYear
member.summary: Gets or sets the production year.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualHomeItemDto.OfficialRating
member.summary: Gets or sets the official rating.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualHomeItemDto.CommunityRating
member.summary: Gets or sets the community rating.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualHomeItemDto.RuntimeTicks
member.summary: Gets or sets the runtime in ticks.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualHomeItemDto.ImagePrimaryUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the primary image URL.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualHomeItemDto.ImageBackdropUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the backdrop image URL.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualHomeItemDto.LogoUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the logo image URL.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualHomeItemDto.Genres
member.summary: Gets or sets the genres.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualHomeItemDto.Studios
member.summary: Gets or sets the studios.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualHomeItemDto.IsFavorite
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the current user marked the item favorite.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualHomeItemDto.IsPlayed
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the current user played the item.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualHomeItemDto.IsResumable
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the current user can resume the item.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualHomeItemDto.Url
member.summary: Gets or sets the Jellyfin Web details URL.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig
member.summary: Configures one visual home section.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the section id.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the section display name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this section is enabled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.VisualType
member.summary: Gets or sets the visual type.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the section order.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.LibraryIds
member.summary: Gets or sets included top-level library ids.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.ItemTypes
member.summary: Gets or sets included item types.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.Genres
member.summary: Gets or sets genre filters.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.OfficialRatings
member.summary: Gets or sets official rating filters.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.Studios
member.summary: Gets or sets studio filters.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.Tags
member.summary: Gets or sets tag filters.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.YearFrom
member.summary: Gets or sets the start year.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.YearTo
member.summary: Gets or sets the end year.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.MinCommunityRating
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum community rating.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.MaxRuntimeMinutes
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum runtime in minutes.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.IsFavorite
member.summary: Gets or sets favorite state filter.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.IsPlayed
member.summary: Gets or sets played state filter.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.IsResumable
member.summary: Gets or sets resumable state filter.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.AddedWithinDays
member.summary: Gets or sets a recent added-days filter.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.PremiereDateFrom
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum premiere date.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.PremiereDateTo
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum premiere date.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.SortBy
member.summary: Gets or sets the sort key.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.SortDescending
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the sort is descending.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.Limit
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum result count.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.CacheMinutes
member.summary: Gets or sets cache lifetime in minutes.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionConfig.VisibleUserIds
member.summary: Gets or sets user ids that may see this section. Empty means all users.

member.summary: Renderable section payload.

member.summary: Gets or sets the section id.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionResult.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the section name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionResult.VisualType
member.summary: Gets or sets the visual type.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionResult.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the section position.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionResult.Items
member.summary: Gets or sets items in this section.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionResult.Success
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the section query succeeded.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Models.VisualSectionResult.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets a controlled error message.

member.summary: Basic recommendation service based only on local Jellyfin data.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Gets local recommendations for a user.

member.summary: Small in-memory cache for section payloads.

member.summary: Gets an existing entry or creates one.

member.summary: Clears all cached entries.

member.summary: Queries Jellyfin library items for configured visual sections.

member.summary: Builds a renderable section.

member.summary: Parses configured item types.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Services.VisualHomeStartupFilter
member.summary: Adds a non-destructive response middleware that injects Visual Home assets into Jellyfin Web.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Services.VisualHomeInjectionMiddleware
member.summary: Injects Visual Home script tags into Jellyfin Web HTML responses without editing web files on disk.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Services.VisualHomeInjectionMiddleware.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Services.VisualHomeInjectionMiddleware})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VisualHome.Services.VisualHomeInjectionMiddleware.Invoke(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Executes the middleware.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
